(1 comment)

Note that I've already updated the first few patches in this series to use "trivial testlist=sanity-hsm", which is what I think you wanted, but not any of the patches marked "fortestonly".

There is a significant test backlog due to LU-8279, so the "fortestonly" patches will all be tested at once as part of the last patch (which is only marked "testlist=sanity-hsm") so it will run sanity-hsm three times under different configurations.

parents.subject: LU-7988 hsm: only browse entries of hsd.request when needed

commit.subject: LU-7988 hsm: remove compound_id from mdt_hsm_add_actions proto
commit.message:
LU-7988 hsm: remove compound_id from mdt_hsm_add_actions proto

mdt_hsm_request is the only caller of mdt_hsm_add_actions and it
doesn't care about compound_id, so make it a local variable, instead
of an output variable.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-hsm
Signed-off-by: frank zago <fzago@cray.com>
Change-Id: Iabf89497aad2cdf6364c155290c6df44487d8039
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/19583
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Vinayak <vinayakswami.hariharmath@seagate.com>
Reviewed-by: Patrick Farrell <paf@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Ben Evans <bevans@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
